title: Short Financial Situation Interview
context: Conducting a qualitative research study on financial wellness and money management habits among working adults in the US. The goal is to understand real lived experiences, not just surface-level attitudes.

pillars.question: How would you describe your current financial situation month-to-month?
What is the biggest source of financial stress or uncertainty for you right now?
What changes have you made recently to manage spending, saving, or debt?
